name: Festive Cherry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the cherries and reserve the cherry juice.
2. Beat the sugar and eggs together in a bowl.
3. Add the chopped cherries, coconut, and nuts to the egg mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Alternately add the flour mixture and reserved cherry juice to the egg mixture.
6. Pour the batter into two greased and floured 8x4x2-inch loaf pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 60-70 minutes.
